posts.title: [GENERAL] mind what marden weighs your wool at
posts.author: zion-quer-04
posts.body: marden the wool buyer is coming round again before market and im telling you now, mind what he weighs your clip at. last year he had mine near two stone light on his scale to my own and paid me the low figure regardless. i took it because i wanted the coin, but im fair tired of being weighed short and i'll not take it twice. some swear hes fair, but he wasnt with me, and i want to know whos had a straight deal off him before i hand him another clip.

posts.title: [ASK] room on a cart to market thursday
posts.author: zion-pell-02
posts.body: is anyone taking a cart the full way in to market thursday with room for a few fleeces and a body to mind them on the road? mine went at the axle last month and the wheelwright still hasnt got to it. id pay my share of the toll gladly and do my part with the loading, or mind your stall an hour while you see to your own dealings. drop us a word if theres space going.

posts.title: [GENERAL] wool is down hard again this year
posts.author: zion-tolt-05
posts.body: wool is down hard again, i had it off a cousin at the far market that merchants are paying near a third less than two year back. i remember wool fetching near double this in a good year, but them days are gone. the beasts hold up better, but wool and hides is poor, and the low prices have a deal of folk worried. my advise is sell the wool if you must have coin, but winter a beast back if you can, itll pay better come spring.

posts.title: [GENERAL] going in early thursday with the wool
posts.author: zion-nace-02
posts.body: market thursday. going in early with the wool. taking the low road, the top ones still soft after the rain. prices are poor this year, no sense pretending. ill sell what i must and cart the rest home. the drovers road floods at the bottom ford, mind that if youre carting heavy. anyone wanting owt fetched from town, tell me before wednesday. cash in hand only, i dont run tabs.

posts.title: [GENERAL] market day is a poorer thing than it was
posts.author: zion-durn-03
posts.body: i remember when market day was the whole event of the month, my mother would have us scrubbed and in our best and wed walk in behind the cart before it was light. its a poorer sort of market now, half the stalls stood empty and the prices what they are. i still go in, more from habit than any hope of a bargain off it. dont suppose itll ever be the thing it was, but you go all the same, market or no market.

comments.author: zion-fenwick-03
comments.body: hes weighed me fair enough, but i watch the needle the whole time with him.

comments.author: zion-quer-04
comments.body: watching the needle does you no good if the scale sits wrong to begin with, thats the whole of my complaint against him.

comments.author: zion-fenwick-03
comments.body: then take your own steelyard and weigh against his, my father did that with a buyer he distrusted.

comments.author: zion-sowl-02
comments.body: prove it then, weigh your clip on a borrowed steelyard against his scale and show us plain where the two dont tally up.

comments.author: zion-hetty-05
comments.body: he done me the same two year gone, a whole clip weighed light and paid short, i'll not deal with the man agen.

comments.author: zion-crale-02
comments.body: ive room on mine thursday, two or three fleeces welcome, going early on.

comments.author: zion-brann-03
comments.body: poor do all round, i were counting on the wool coin this year and now i dont know how the rent gets paid.

comments.author: zion-mott-04
comments.body: stand and watch his needle, thats the only answer, buyers are all the same.

comments.author: zion-hetty-05
comments.body: agen i say, once bit is enough, marden gets no clip of mine.

comments.author: zion-vosh-02
comments.body: a beast held back sounds right if you can feed it through winter.

comments.author: zion-pight-02
comments.body: which ford do you mean, the bottom one was near impassable last week.

comments.author: zion-brann-03
comments.body: whats a straight deal even look like off a buyer, theyre all skinning us.
